title: Consensus
description: Aggregated consensus result computed from all agent release-readiness votes for a given task. Determines whether the task may proceed to the next stage.

task_id.description: ID of the task for which consensus was computed.

can_proceed.description: Whether the task is cleared to advance to the next lifecycle stage based on the aggregated votes.

ratio.description: Weighted approval ratio between 0.0 (no approval) and 1.0 (unanimous approval), computed from effective weights of ready votes.

action.description: Recommended action derived from the consensus result. 'proceed' advances the task, 'rework' returns it for revision, 'escalate' routes to human oversight.

details.description: Per-agent breakdown of votes contributing to this consensus.

items.description: Individual agent vote detail used in the consensus computation.

agent_id.description: Unique identifier of the voting agent.

score.description: Readiness score submitted by this agent (0-100).

vote.description: Release vote cast by this agent.

confidence.description: Confidence level reported by this agent (0.0-1.0).

effective_weight.description: Weight applied to this agent's vote in the final ratio computation, accounting for confidence and role-based adjustments.

re_review_count.description: Number of re-review cycles completed for this task prior to this consensus result.

computed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this consensus result was computed.
